$comment: CANONICAL PRODUCT FACTS — single source of truth. README, llms.txt, index.html, skills/README, and presentation copy are validated against this by test/product-facts-drift.test.js. Change a fact HERE, then let the drift guard tell you which surfaces still disagree. Do not hand-edit a number in six places.
positioning: Independent evidence and decision audit layer for AI systems
one_line: Cryptographic evidence + independent audit layer for AI decisions — signs, grounds, and adversarially checks what an agent (yours or a third party's) actually decided.

regulatory_references.$discipline: These alias/complement rules are enforced by the drift guard. Do NOT delete a superseded standard — keep it as a searchable legacy alias with an explicit supersession note.

current.title: Revised Guidance on Model Risk Management
Human oversight of high-risk AI
current.note: in force; complementary to GDPR Art. 22, NOT replaced by it

current.title: Automated individual decision-making
current.note: complementary to EU AI Act Art. 14 and the Schufa interpretation

current.title: ECJ interpretation of automated credit scoring

regulatory_references.scope_honesty: SR 26-2 (like SR 11-7) currently scopes generative/agentic AI OUT of its model-risk guidance pending a future study. Shadow positions as an independent evidence layer filling that governance gap — it does NOT claim regulation already mandates it.

verified_capabilities.note: rule-based loan council; verdicts are deterministic if/else, NOT LLM-decided
structural only — seals a vendor agent's trace; semantic audit of ingested content is device-pending (see auditIngestedOutput)
post-hoc; n<100; NOT a production coverage certificate

pending_capabilities.note: auditIngestedOutput ingestion boundary — the third-party differentiator
shared fact source for Shadow / Unity / Flow / verifier
RESEARCH-GRADE coverage evaluation only; NOT production-certified; n<100 forces heavy abstention
reuses SpatialLayout.AuditArc/VerificationCascade; device validation pending Beam Pro
HEAD-DIRECTED FOCUS via XRI gaze interactor abstraction; hover/highlight only; NOT eye tracking; no dwell approval

confidence_semantics.$note: The per-voice numbers in the deterministic council (0.82 / 0.78 / 0.91 / 0.74 / 0.69) are FIXED persona priors, not model probabilities. Never render them as 'model confidence' or 'probability correct'.
